code: import HomePage from'./pages/HomePage';import CategoryPage from'./pages/CategoryPage';import CompanyPage from'./pages/CompanyPage';import LoginPage from'./pages/LoginPage';import ProductPage from'./pages/ProductPage';const routes=[{path:'/',element:HomePage,exact:true},{path:'/category/:city/:query',element:CategoryPage},{path:'/company/:id?',element:CompanyPage},{path:'/product/:productId',element:ProductPage},{path:'/login',element:LoginPage}];export default routes;
